orgs.name: National Legal Services Authority (NALSA)
orgs.help: Free legal aid for those who cannot afford a lawyer.

orgs.name: Tenant helpline (State Rent Authority)
orgs.help: Guidance on deposits, eviction and rent disputes.

orgs.name: Labour Commissioner / Shram Suvidha
orgs.help: File complaints about unpaid wages and unfair work terms.

orgs.help: Free help for low-wage workers on pay, leave and rights.

orgs.help: Self-help on eviction, small claims and tenant rights.

orgs.name: Bay Area Legal Aid
orgs.help: Free civil legal services including housing and benefits.
